allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-ChildItem '\\''C:\\Users\\kbknm_\\OneDrive\\ドキュメント\\ninkatsu-site'\\'' -Recurse -Filter '\\''*.html'\\'' | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne '\\''googlec662668f9767619f.html'\\'' } | ForEach-Object { $c = [IO.File]::ReadAllText\($_.FullName,[Text.Encoding]::UTF8\); if \($c -notmatch '\\''pagead2'\\''\) { $tag = '\\''  <script async src=https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-2221405400823928 crossorigin=anonymous></script>'\\''; $new = $c -replace '\\''</head>'\\'',"$tag`n</head>"; [IO.File]::WriteAllText\($_.FullName,$new,[Text.UTF8Encoding]::new\($false\)\); Write-Host $_.Name } }; Write-Host done')
